plot outline: Based on the thrilling and inspirational life of an iconic American freedom fighter, Harriet tells the extraordinary tale of Harriet Tubman's escape from slavery and transformation into one of America's greatest heroes. Her courage, ingenuity, and tenacity freed hundreds of slaves and changed the course of history.
title: Harriet
akas: Harriet - Der Weg in die Freiheit (Germany)
Harriet: En busca de la libertad (Spain)
